prompt: An Arduino Uno sits on a clean workbench with a 10k NTC thermistor wired as a voltage divider, its leads tucked into a small breadboard beside a USB cable. A laptop with the Arduino IDE open glows softly in the background, hinting at continuous temperature logging. The solarpunk workspace has warm lighting, tidy tools, and a small plant nearby. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization and no readable text.
